privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic WooCommerce data created via WP-CLI. The order contains two items: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (SKU: WBH-001, price: $79.99) and USB-C Laptop Charger 65W (SKU: USBC-065, price: $34.99), totaling $114.98. The customer is Emily Davis (emily.davis@example.com). The task requires processing a partial refund of $34.99 for only the charger item with reason containing the keyword 'damaged'.
